key_insight: Creep-fatigue interaction in single-crystal nickel superalloys is difficult to predict because the response depends on the combined effects of loading parameters, hold time, temperature, and the underlying deformation mechanisms.
engineering_relevance: Potential relevance: fracture and damage workflows and research evaluation.
